title: Log container command before starting the container
body: Runc does not produce helpful error messages when the container's command is not found, so print the command ourselves.

comments.body: @EmilienM This will at least let us know what command we're trying to execute when we run the container
Wait, hold on merging this, printing in the wrong place
Nevermind, this actually works fine. Got very confused because the Fedora base image does not specify ENTRYPOINT.
